hfec25983gbbd6g4441gb051g933986d34a12: If I wanted you dead, you would be. Don't tempt me.
h46ea6ee2g96abg446dg97b3g55e305aab37f: ((*I am sovereign. And you bring the rot. Duergar.*))

hc811f4c4gead2g44adg84ceg346f7df669d1: *You see a vision: your lifeless body, wrapped in fungal tendrils. The sovereign is threatening you.*
hf5439f8egc987g4da9gb458g7352bcc6dad7: I sense your fear. I've come to aid you.
h9a4b6063g1b8bg4851gad98g65bec433a659: Focus on your parasite and connect with the sovereign.
hd3ec1f2ag3767g4ab7gbc42g5510978e1334: *The parasite is quiet. You feel no bond with the creature.*
h9a137e8egdd46g4262gb8abge240e3315008: Tell the truth of the parasite. You only seek safe passage in your search for treatment.
h6eadc67eg323fg4aa0gb520g71a9c245e2bb: I am a traveller seeking adventure.
h62757602g0ec5g4b65g9a70ga0869091c5eb: *Fungal roots weave through your mind, seeking your true intent.*
ha55e9398g3a45g4462g965bgdd16129de891: *Then the sovereign drones a new melody, cautious but welcoming.*
h2355a585gf264g4a25ga104gb70efa837019: ((*I can neither mend skin nor spirit. But we still might commune.*))
h4cba5c13g7791g4aefgab93gb0b1d3ac74d5: ((*Descend to me. Let us speak in flesh.*))
he593739dg1924g42f0ga432g9091bfc4c353: *The persistent music coaxes you forward. The sovereign expects you.*

h38bc963egb64ag4b3cg8f97gb66adeca5f54: Let me pass. I've come for the runaway gnome.

h90bcfc7dg4ecag415fga6eagc0c4ef50150b: These tricks of the mind don't frighten me - I'll kill you!
